---
name: Something did not work
about: A prompt, skill, or guide gave a wrong or confusing result
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Which skill or guide?**
Name the folder or file, for example `skills/grading-assistant/` or `guides/canvas-lms.md`.

**What level were you using?**
Copy-paste (level 1), connected (level 2), or computer control (level 3). If you are not sure, say which AI tool you used.

**What did you do?**
The steps you took. If you can, paste the prompt you used with any student details removed.

**What did you expect to happen?**

**What actually happened?**
Paste the result if you can, with real names and any student data removed first.

**Anything else?**
Your LMS, your AI tool, screenshots, whatever helps.
